name: HMS Laurel (T 29)
events: 3 Nov 1941 HMS Clyde (Cdr. D.C. Ingram, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Gibraltar with HMS Wishart (Cdr. H.G. Scott, RN). Clyde also conducted gunnery exercises on a target that was towed by HMS Laurel (T/Skr. T.W. Morgan, RNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
